entity.label: Sherezer
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: One of the messengers whom the children of the Captivity sent to Jerusalem “to pray for them before the Lord” (Zech. 7:2).

nodes.label: Sherezer
nodes.description: One of the messengers whom the children of the Captivity sent to Jerusalem “to pray for them before the Lord” (Zech. 7:2).

verses.text: When they had sent unto the house of God Sherezer and Regemmelech, and their men, to pray before the LORD,
